title: Review CI release automation for signoff
description: Perform final review of the workflow and documentation together, focusing on correctness, risk of release/version collisions, permission scope, and consistency with the feature spec acceptance criteria.
acceptance_criteria: Review verifies the workflow behavior matches the spec's acceptance criteria end to end.
Review verifies permission scope is minimal and limited to `publish` job `contents: write`.
Review verifies documentation reflects the implemented workflow and versioning behavior.
Review records any remaining operational caveats for the first production run, or approves the feature if no blocking findings remain.
